title: High Frequency Draw (High Alert)
content:
Les bougies sur les tombeaux
        (The candles on the graves)
        antilles dread locks ...
        french chocolate it is not.
meaning:
"High Frequency Draw (High Alert)" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
